title: Peter Magyar Prepares to Take Over as Hungary’s Leader From Viktor Orban
summary_full: The former opposition leader, who won a landslide election, now faces the formidable job of dismantling what his predecessor called an “illiberal democracy.”
summary_public: The former opposition leader, who won a landslide election, now faces the formidable job of dismantling what his predecessor called an “illiberal democracy.”

HU.label: positive
HU.evidence: dismantling what his predecessor called an “illiberal democracy.”
